---
title: "Lecture 17 Quiz: UI Events & Event Handling"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-17.qmd) | [Week 5 Content](/content/week-05.qmd) | [Lab 5](/labs/lab-05.qmd) | [Home Assignment 2](/assignment/02-assignment.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 17 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `querySelectorAll()`", "B. `appendChild()`", "C. `innerHTML`", "D. `classList.add()`"]
question = "Question 1: Which option returns all matching elements for a CSS selector?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `textValue`", "B. `innerHTML`", "C. `nodeText`", "D. `htmlValue`"]
question = "Question 2: Which property can insert HTML markup inside an element?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `className.push()`", "B. `style.toggle()`", "C. `classList.toggle()`", "D. `toggleClassName()`"]
question = "Question 3: Which method is commonly used to toggle a CSS class on an element?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `map()`", "B. `pop()`", "C. `shift()`", "D. `sort()`"]
question = "Question 4: Which array method creates a new array by transforming each element?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `document.createNode()`", "B. `document.newElement()`", "C. `document.createElement()`", "D. `document.appendElement()`"]
question = "Question 5: Which method creates a new DOM element in JavaScript?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
